---
title: "Mingyuan You (Billy)"
subtitle: "MSc Housing and City Planning student at UCL"
image: images/profile_pic.jpg
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: rounded
---

```{r load_packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(fontawesome)
```

::: {#hero-heading}
::: {.academic-block .hero-summary}
Hello, I am Mingyuan You (Billy). Welcome to my portfolio.

I am an <span class="academic-accent">urban planning</span> and <span class="academic-accent">housing</span> student at UCL, motivated to pursue chartered RTPI membership within a multidisciplinary planning context.

My interests include sustainable housing delivery, retrofit, planning policy, development management, infrastructure-related workstreams and the protection of the historic built environment.
:::

[<i class="bi bi-github" style="font-size: 1.5rem;"></i>](https://github.com/Jaojaobot) [<i class="bi bi-envelope" style="font-size: 1.5rem;"></i>](mailto:mingyuan.you.25@ucl.ac.uk) [<i class="bi bi-linkedin" style="font-size: 1.5rem;"></i>](https://linkedin.com/in/mingyuan-you)

[About](about.qmd){.about-links .dynamic-link} [Coursework](coursework.qmd){.about-links .dynamic-link} [CV](cv.qmd){.about-links .dynamic-link}
:::

## Planning Experience

::: {.project-grid}
::: {.project-card}
### City of Edinburgh Council

Student Planner experience assessing planning and related applications, including listed building consent, advertisement consent and certificates of lawfulness.

[View CV](cv.qmd)
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Kampala Capital City Authority

Planning internship experience involving planning enforcement work and community mediation around the Greater Kampala Metropolitan Area.

[View CV](cv.qmd)
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Anyang Zhongshen Real Estate

Market feasibility research for a venue rental site on the Entebbe-Kampala highway, including site visits and rental data collection.

[View CV](cv.qmd)
:::
:::

## Professional Interests

- Housing delivery, residential design and retrofit
- Development management, planning policy and local authority processes
- Heritage, listed buildings and the historic built environment
- Infrastructure, community mediation and evidence-led planning

[View references and project sources](references.qmd)
